C) To request a refund for the renovation services
D) To praise the contractor for quality workmanship
choices_kr: 리모델링 지연에 대해 공식적으로 불만을 제기하고 경고 발령
steps.kr: 5월 1일까지 작업이 완료되지 않으면 계약서에 명시된 대로 보상을 요청하고 법적 옵션을 모색할 수밖에 없습니다.

sentences: We are excited to welcome you as a new client of Apex Digital Solutions and look forward to supporting your business growth.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A new client expressing excitement about a partnership
B) Apex Digital Solutions welcoming a new client
C) A business consultant introducing two companies
D) An industry association welcoming a new member
choices_kr: 파트너십에 대한 기대를 표현하는 새 고객
새 고객을 환영하는 Apex Digital Solutions

expressions.expr: welcome you as a new client

steps.kr: Apex Digital Solutions의 새 고객으로 귀하를 환영하게 되어 기쁘며 귀하의 비즈니스 성장을 지원하기를 기대합니다.

sentences: Your dedicated account manager, Ms. Park, will contact you within 24 hours to schedule a kickoff call and discuss your goals.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A potential client considering the company's services
B) A new business client who recently signed an agreement
C) Ms. Park, the newly assigned account manager
D) An existing client being transferred to a new manager
choices_kr: 회사 서비스를 고려 중인 잠재 고객
최근 계약을 체결한 새 비즈니스 고객
새로 배정된 계정 관리자 박 씨
steps.kr: 전담 계정 관리자 박 씨가 24시간 이내에 연락하여 킥오프 통화 일정을 잡고 귀하의 목표를 논의할 것입니다.

sentences: In the meantime, please explore our resource center at apex.com/resources, where you will find helpful guides and onboarding materials.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To upsell additional services to an existing client
B) To welcome and onboard a new business client
C) To resolve a complaint from a dissatisfied client
D) To invite a client to a product demonstration
choices_kr: 새 비즈니스 고객 환영 및 온보딩
steps.kr: 그 동안 apex.com/resources의 리소스 센터를 둘러보세요. 유용한 가이드와 온보딩 자료를 찾을 수 있습니다.

sentences: This is a memo from the Quality Assurance Department requesting all production supervisors to submit their monthly quality review reports by this Friday.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) A production supervisor submitting a report
B) The Quality Assurance Department requesting reports
C) Senior management reviewing productivity
D) An external auditor requesting documentation
steps.kr: 이 메모는 모든 생산 감독관이 이번 주 금요일까지 월간 품질 검토 보고서를 제출하도록 요청하는 품질 보증 부서의 메모입니다.

sentences: As production supervisors, you are required to include defect rates, corrective actions taken, and line efficiency statistics in your report.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) All factory employees including line workers
B) Production supervisors responsible for monthly reports
C) Sales managers reviewing product quality data
D) External suppliers providing raw materials
choices_kr: 라인 작업자를 포함한 모든 공장 직원
제품 품질 데이터를 검토하는 영업 관리자
steps.kr: 생산 감독관으로서 보고서에 불량률, 취해진 시정 조치 및 라인 효율성 통계를 포함해야 합니다.

sentences: Reports must be submitted through the QA portal by 5 P.M. on Friday; late submissions will not be included in the monthly analysis.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce new quality standards for production
B) To request production supervisors to submit monthly quality reports
C) To share the results of last month's quality review
D) To inform staff of a new QA software system
choices_kr: 생산을 위한 새 품질 기준 발표
생산 감독관에게 월간 품질 보고서 제출 요청
steps.kr: 보고서는 금요일 오후 5시까지 QA 포털을 통해 제출해야 하며, 늦게 제출된 것은 월간 분석에 포함되지 않습니다.

sentences: I am writing to announce the grand opening of our new branch office in Incheon, which will serve clients across the metropolitan area starting May 20th.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A city official welcoming a new business to Incheon
B) A company announcing the opening of a new branch
C) A real estate firm that sold the office space
D) An event company hired for the opening ceremony
choices_kr: 새 사업체를 인천에 환영하는 시 관계자
steps.kr: 5월 20일부터 수도권 전체 고객을 위한 인천 신규 지점 개설을 발표하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As valued partners and clients, you are among the first to be informed of this exciting expansion.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) Incheon city officials approving the branch permit
B) Existing clients and partners of the company
C) Job applicants interested in working at the new branch
D) Journalists covering the business expansion
choices_kr: 지점 허가를 승인하는 인천 시 관계자
새 지점에서 근무하는 데 관심 있는 취업 지원자
steps.kr: 소중한 파트너 및 고객으로서 귀하는 이 흥미로운 확장 소식을 가장 먼저 알게 되는 분들 중 한 분입니다.

sentences: We invite you to attend our opening reception on May 20th at 5 P.M. at 88 Songdo Boulevard, Incheon, where refreshments and special offers will be available.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request a partner company's endorsement for the new branch
B) To announce a new branch opening and invite clients to the launch event
C) To notify clients of a change in their primary point of contact
D) To offer clients an exclusive discount on all services
choices_kr: 파트너 회사의 새 지점 추천 요청
새 지점 개설 발표 및 고객을 오프닝 행사에 초대
고객에게 모든 서비스 독점 할인 제공
steps.kr: 5월 20일 오후 5시 인천 송도대로 88번지에서 열리는 개업 리셉션에 초대합니다. 다과와 특별 혜택이 제공됩니다.

sentences: I am writing to apply for a small business development loan of $30,000 through your bank's SME Support Program.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A bank officer offering loan options to businesses
B) A small business owner applying for a loan
C) A financial advisor recommending a loan product
D) A government office overseeing SME programs
choices_kr: 기업에 대출 옵션을 제공하는 은행 직원
steps.kr: 귀 은행의 중소기업 지원 프로그램을 통해 $30,000의 소기업 개발 대출을 신청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I would like to expand my bakery business by purchasing additional commercial baking equipment and renovating the production area.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A bakery equipment supplier reviewing an order
B) A bank or lending institution receiving a loan application
C) A business partner being asked for an investment
D) A commercial real estate agent assisting with renovation
choices_kr: 대출 신청을 받는 은행 또는 금융 기관
steps.kr: 추가 상업용 제과 기기를 구매하고 생산 구역을 리모델링하여 베이커리 사업을 확장하고자 합니다.

sentences: Please let me know what documents are required to proceed with the application, and I am available for a meeting at your convenience.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request information about available banking products
B) To apply for a business development loan and ask about required documents
C) To report difficulty repaying an existing business loan
D) To negotiate better interest rates on a current loan
choices_kr: 이용 가능한 은행 상품에 대한 정보 요청
비즈니스 개발 대출 신청 및 필요 서류 문의
기존 사업 대출 상환 어려움 신고
steps.kr: 신청을 진행하는 데 필요한 서류를 알려주시면 편한 시간에 회의를 위해 대기하고 있습니다.

sentences: This is a notice from the Parking Administration Office informing all staff that parking permits for the upcoming fiscal year must be renewed by April 30th.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) A security company managing the parking area
B) The Parking Administration Office
C) An employee who lost their parking permit
D) Building management announcing a parking expansion
steps.kr: 이것은 다음 회계연도를 위한 주차 허가증이 4월 30일까지 갱신되어야 함을 전 직원에게 알리는 주차 관리 사무소의 공지입니다.

sentences: All employees who currently hold a company parking permit must complete the online renewal form on the staff portal before the deadline.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) New employees applying for a parking permit for the first time
B) Employees who currently hold a parking permit
C) Security staff responsible for issuing permits
D) Visitors who use the company parking lot
choices_kr: 처음으로 주차 허가증을 신청하는 신입 직원
steps.kr: 현재 회사 주차 허가증을 보유한 모든 직원은 마감 전 직원 포털의 온라인 갱신 양식을 작성해야 합니다.

sentences: Permits not renewed by the deadline will be deactivated, and unauthorized parking may result in vehicle removal at the owner's expense.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce new parking rules for visitors
B) To remind employees to renew their parking permits before the deadline
C) To introduce a new company carpool program
D) To notify employees of additional parking space availability
choices_kr: 방문객을 위한 새 주차 규칙 발표
마감 전 주차 허가증 갱신 상기시킴
steps.kr: 마감까지 갱신되지 않은 허가증은 비활성화되며, 무단 주차 시 차량이 소유자 비용으로 견인될 수 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to invite you to participate as a volunteer in our annual community tree-planting event scheduled for April 22nd, Earth Day.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A city government department asking for citizen participation
B) A non-profit or community organization recruiting volunteers
C) A school organizing an environmental field trip
D) A corporate HR team organizing a CSR activity
choices_kr: 시민 참여를 요청하는 시 정부 부서
자원봉사자를 모집하는 비영리 또는 지역 사회 단체
steps.kr: 4월 22일 지구의 날에 예정된 연례 지역 사회 나무 심기 행사에 자원봉사자로 참가해 주시기를 초대합니다.

sentences: You were recommended by the local community center as an environmentally conscious individual who may be interested in contributing to this cause.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A corporate sponsor funding the event
B) A community member being recruited as a volunteer
C) A government official approving the event permit
D) A gardening expert being asked to lead a session
steps.kr: 귀하는 이 목적에 기여하는 데 관심이 있을 수 있는 환경 의식이 있는 개인으로서 지역 커뮤니티 센터로부터 추천받았습니다.

sentences: Volunteers are needed from 8 A.M. to 1 P.M., and lunch will be provided for all participants.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request a donation for an environmental charity
B) To recruit a volunteer for a community tree-planting event
C) To promote membership in an environmental organization
D) To invite the recipient to speak at an Earth Day conference
choices_kr: 환경 자선 단체를 위한 기부 요청
지역 사회 나무 심기 행사를 위한 자원봉사자 모집
수신자를 지구의 날 컨퍼런스 연사로 초대
steps.kr: 자원봉사자는 오전 8시부터 오후 1시까지 필요하며, 모든 참가자에게 점심이 제공됩니다.

sentences: I am writing to formally acknowledge receipt of your complaint submitted on April 1st regarding unsatisfactory service at our Gangnam location.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A customer who submitted the original complaint
B) A company representative acknowledging a complaint
C) A manager at the Gangnam location responding personally
D) A government consumer protection agency
steps.kr: 4월 1일 저희 강남 지점의 불만족스러운 서비스에 관해 제출하신 불만 사항 접수를 공식적으로 확인합니다.

sentences: We take all customer concerns very seriously and have begun an internal review of your experience with our service team.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The service team member who handled the customer
B) A customer who submitted a complaint
C) The branch manager responsible for the team
D) A regulatory body reviewing service standards
steps.kr: 모든 고객 우려 사항을 매우 진지하게 받아들이며 서비스팀과의 귀하의 경험에 대한 내부 검토를 시작했습니다.

sentences: A full response addressing your concerns will be provided within five business days, and we sincerely apologize for any distress caused.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To resolve a customer complaint immediately
B) To acknowledge a customer complaint and confirm it is being reviewed
C) To offer the customer a refund for the experience
D) To explain the company's service policies
choices_kr: 고객 불만을 접수 확인하고 검토 중임을 통보
steps.kr: 귀하의 우려 사항을 해결하는 전체 답변이 영업일 기준 5일 이내에 제공될 것이며, 야기된 불편에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다.

sentences: I am writing to follow up on the background check authorization form I submitted to your office three weeks ago.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A company HR officer reviewing background checks
B) A job applicant following up on a background check
C) A background check agency requesting additional information
D) A manager awaiting a new hire's clearance
choices_kr: 신원 조회를 검토하는 회사 인사 담당자
신원 조회를 후속 확인하는 취업 지원자
추가 정보를 요청하는 신원 조회 기관
steps.kr: 3주 전 귀 사무소에 제출한 신원 조회 승인 양식을 후속 확인하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I was informed during my onboarding that the process would take one to two weeks, but I have not received any update since then.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The hiring manager who offered the job
B) The HR or compliance office processing the background check
C) The reference who was contacted for the check
D) The background check company directly
choices_kr: 신원 조회를 처리하는 인사 또는 준법 사무소
steps.kr: 온보딩 중에 절차에 1~2주가 소요된다고 들었지만, 그 이후로 아무런 업데이트를 받지 못했습니다.

sentences: Could you please provide an estimated completion date so I can plan accordingly for my start date on May 5th?
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To withdraw a job application
B) To inquire about the status of a background check
C) To dispute information found in a background check
D) To request a letter confirming employment
choices_kr: 신원 조회에서 발견된 정보에 이의 제기
steps.kr: 5월 5일 시작 날짜에 맞게 계획할 수 있도록 예상 완료 날짜를 알려주시겠습니까?

sentences: I am writing to invite you to be a guest speaker on our podcast, 'Business Minds Korea,' which focuses on entrepreneurship and innovation.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A guest speaker confirming a podcast appearance
B) A podcast host inviting a guest speaker
C) A listener requesting a specific guest
D) A media agency representing the speaker
steps.kr: 기업가 정신과 혁신에 초점을 맞춘 저희 팟캐스트 'Business Minds Korea'의 게스트 연사로 귀하를 초대하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: Your recent article on sustainable business models has garnered significant attention, and we believe your insights would greatly benefit our audience of 50,000 monthly listeners.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A podcast listener being invited to participate
B) A business expert being invited to appear as a guest
C) A journalist who wrote about the podcast
D) A sponsor interested in advertising on the podcast
steps.kr: 지속 가능한 비즈니스 모델에 관한 귀하의 최근 기사가 상당한 주목을 받았으며, 귀하의 통찰이 월 50,000명의 청취자에게 크게 도움이 될 것이라고 생각합니다.

sentences: The recording session would take approximately 45 minutes and can be conducted remotely at a time that suits you.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To offer the recipient advertising space on the podcast
B) To invite a business expert to be a guest speaker on a podcast
C) To request content for a podcast episode about the recipient
D) To ask the recipient to sponsor the podcast
choices_kr: 비즈니스 전문가를 팟캐스트 게스트 연사로 초대
수신자에 관한 팟캐스트 에피소드를 위한 콘텐츠 요청
steps.kr: 녹화 세션은 약 45분이 소요되며 귀하에게 맞는 시간에 원격으로 진행할 수 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to formally request an equipment loan of one portable projector and two wireless microphones for our department's client presentation on May 8th.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) An IT department lending equipment to another team
B) A staff member requesting equipment for a presentation
C) An event company offering audio-visual rental services
D) A manager approving an equipment budget
choices_kr: 다른 팀에 장비를 대여하는 IT 부서
음향 영상 대여 서비스를 제공하는 이벤트 회사
steps.kr: 5월 8일 부서 고객 발표를 위한 휴대용 프로젝터 1대와 무선 마이크 2개의 장비 대여를 공식적으로 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As the department responsible for managing shared office equipment, we request your confirmation of availability and pickup procedures.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A client attending the presentation
B) The office equipment or facilities management team
C) A vendor selling the required equipment
D) A colleague helping to set up the room
choices_kr: 방을 준비하는 데 도움을 주는 동료
steps.kr: 공용 사무실 장비 관리를 담당하는 부서로서 가용성 확인 및 수령 절차를 요청드립니다.

sentences: We will ensure all items are returned in good condition by 5 P.M. on May 8th.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To report damaged office equipment
B) To request a loan of shared equipment for a presentation
C) To submit a purchase request for new equipment
D) To reserve a conference room for a client meeting
choices_kr: 발표를 위한 공용 장비 대여 요청
steps.kr: 모든 물품이 5월 8일 오후 5시까지 양호한 상태로 반납될 것을 보장하겠습니다.

sentences: I am writing to introduce myself as your newly assigned client services coordinator here at Meridian Publishing.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A client introducing themselves to a new company
B) A newly assigned coordinator at Meridian Publishing
C) A former coordinator handing off a client account
D) A recruiting agency introducing a new hire
steps.kr: Meridian Publishing의 귀하의 새로 배정된 클라이언트 서비스 코디네이터로서 자기 소개를 드리기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I will be taking over from Ms. Seo, who has moved to our London office, and will be your primary point of contact going forward.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) Ms. Seo, the coordinator who is moving
B) A client whose coordinator has changed
C) The London office that received Ms. Seo
D) Senior management overseeing the transition
steps.kr: 런던 사무소로 이동한 서 씨를 대신하여 앞으로 귀하의 주요 연락 담당자가 될 것입니다.

sentences: I would love to schedule a brief introductory call this week to familiarize myself with your current projects and any ongoing needs.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To inform a client that their account is being closed
B) To introduce a new coordinator and propose an introductory call
C) To request feedback on the previous coordinator's performance
D) To offer new publishing services to the client
choices_kr: 새 코디네이터 소개 및 초기 통화 제안
이전 코디네이터 성과에 대한 피드백 요청
steps.kr: 귀하의 현재 프로젝트와 진행 중인 필요 사항에 익숙해지기 위해 이번 주 짧은 자기 소개 통화를 잡고 싶습니다.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that the password for your employee account has been reset due to a security audit conducted last Friday.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) An employee who forgot their password
B) The IT support team resetting passwords
C) A cybersecurity company reporting a breach
D) An employee reporting suspicious login activity
steps.kr: 지난 금요일 실시된 보안 감사로 인해 귀하의 직원 계정 비밀번호가 재설정되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: As an active employee whose account was identified as requiring an update, you must create a new password within 24 hours of receiving this email.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) An IT staff member responsible for the security audit
B) An employee whose password was reset and needs to update it
C) A manager approving the security audit
D) A new employee setting up their account for the first time
steps.kr: 업데이트가 필요한 계정으로 확인된 현직 직원으로서 이 이메일을 받은 후 24시간 이내에 새 비밀번호를 만들어야 합니다.

sentences: Please click the secure link below and follow the instructions to set up your new password without delay.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To warn an employee of a phishing attempt
B) To notify an employee of a password reset and request an update
C) To inform an employee of a change in login portal
D) To request an employee to verify their identity
choices_kr: 비밀번호 재설정을 직원에게 알리고 업데이트 요청
steps.kr: 아래 보안 링크를 클릭하고 지체 없이 새 비밀번호를 설정하는 지침을 따르십시오.

sentences: I am reaching out on behalf of the Student Exchange Committee at Yonsei University to offer you a placement in our upcoming international exchange program.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A student applying for an exchange program
B) Yonsei University's Student Exchange Committee
C) A host university abroad confirming acceptance
D) A scholarship organization funding the exchange
steps.kr: 연세대학교 학생교류위원회를 대신하여 다가오는 국제 교환 프로그램 자리를 귀하에게 제공하기 위해 연락드립니다.

sentences: You have been selected for a one-semester placement at the University of Edinburgh beginning in September, based on your academic merit and language proficiency.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A faculty member being offered a visiting professor position
B) A student selected for an international exchange program
C) A university administrator coordinating the program
D) A parent being informed of their child's selection
steps.kr: 귀하의 학업 성취도와 언어 능력을 바탕으로 9월부터 시작하는 에든버러 대학교의 한 학기 과정에 선발되었습니다.

sentences: Please confirm your acceptance by April 25th and attend the mandatory pre-departure orientation on May 10th.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To reject a student's exchange program application
B) To offer a student a place in an international exchange program
C) To request that a student resubmit their application
D) To inform a student of a change in their exchange partner university
choices_kr: 학생에게 국제 교환 프로그램 자리 제공
학생에게 교환 파트너 대학 변경 안내
steps.kr: 4월 25일까지 수락을 확인하고 5월 10일 필수 출국 전 오리엔테이션에 참석해 주십시오.

sentences: This notice is from the Employee Recognition Committee to announce that Mr. Daniel Cho has been selected as Employee of the Quarter for Q1 2025.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) Mr. Daniel Cho announcing his own achievement
B) The Employee Recognition Committee
C) Mr. Cho's direct supervisor recommending him
D) The company CEO recognizing departmental performance
choices_kr: Daniel Cho 씨가 자신의 성취를 발표
steps.kr: 이것은 Daniel Cho 씨가 2025년 1분기 분기 최우수 직원으로 선정되었음을 발표하는 직원 인정 위원회의 공지입니다.

sentences: Mr. Cho's outstanding contribution to the development of our new customer onboarding process has significantly improved client satisfaction scores.
steps.question: Who is this memo primarily about?
choices: A) The entire customer service department
B) Mr. Daniel Cho, the award recipient
C) The clients who gave positive feedback
D) The committee members who voted for the award
steps.kr: 새 고객 온보딩 프로세스 개발에 대한 조 씨의 탁월한 기여가 고객 만족도 점수를 크게 향상시켰습니다.

sentences: Please join us in congratulating Mr. Cho at the monthly all-staff meeting this Friday, where he will receive a certificate and a gift card.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce a new performance evaluation criteria
B) To recognize an outstanding employee and invite colleagues to celebrate
C) To inform staff of changes to the employee rewards program
D) To nominate candidates for the next quarterly award
choices_kr: 우수 직원을 인정하고 동료들에게 축하 참여 초대
steps.kr: 이번 금요일 전 직원 월간 회의에서 조 씨에게 상장과 상품권이 수여될 예정이니 함께 축하해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that your parking permit application for the Hannam district resident zone has been approved and is now ready for collection.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A resident applying for a parking permit
B) A district office or authority approving a permit application
C) A parking lot attendant issuing a permit
D) A homeowners' association managing parking
choices_kr: 허가 신청을 승인하는 지방 사무소 또는 기관
steps.kr: 한남구 거주자 구역 주차 허가증 신청이 승인되었으며 이제 수령 가능함을 알려드립니다.

sentences: As a registered resident of Hannam-dong, your permit will be valid from May 1st to April 30th of the following year.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A visitor applying for temporary parking access
B) A resident who applied for a residential parking permit
C) A business owner requesting commercial parking access
D) A new resident who has not yet registered
steps.kr: 한남동 등록된 거주자로서 귀하의 허가증은 5월 1일부터 다음 해 4월 30일까지 유효합니다.

sentences: Please visit our district office at 12 Hannam-daero with your ID and the approval notice to collect your physical permit sticker.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To reject a resident's parking permit application
B) To notify a resident that their parking permit is approved and ready to collect
C) To inform a resident of new parking regulations in the area
D) To request payment for the parking permit fee
choices_kr: 주차 허가증이 승인되어 수령 가능함을 거주자에게 통보
거주자에게 지역 내 새 주차 규정 안내
steps.kr: 실물 허가 스티커를 수령하려면 신분증과 승인 통지서를 가지고 한남대로 12번지 지방 사무소를 방문해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to express my interest in the mentorship program listed on your company website and to formally apply as a mentee.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A senior professional offering to mentor others
B) A person applying to be a mentee in a mentorship program
C) A company HR manager launching a new mentorship program
D) An organization seeking a corporate partner for mentorship
choices_kr: 새 멘토십 프로그램을 시작하는 회사 인사 관리자
멘토십을 위한 기업 파트너를 찾는 단체
steps.kr: 귀사 웹사이트에 나열된 멘토십 프로그램에 관심을 표명하고 멘티로 공식 지원하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I am a recent graduate with a background in finance and am eager to gain practical industry guidance from experienced professionals in your organization.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A university career center assisting with job placement
B) A company or organization that runs a mentorship program
C) A specific senior employee being asked to be a personal mentor
D) A classmate who recommended the mentorship program
choices_kr: 취업 배치를 지원하는 대학 취업 센터
멘토십 프로그램을 운영하는 회사 또는 단체
개인 멘토가 되어달라는 요청을 받는 특정 고위 직원
steps.kr: 저는 금융 배경을 가진 최근 졸업생으로 귀 조직의 경험 있는 전문가들로부터 실질적인 산업 지도를 받고 싶습니다.

sentences: I have attached my resume and a brief statement of my career goals for your review and would appreciate the opportunity to be considered.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To apply for a full-time position at the company
B) To apply to participate as a mentee in a mentorship program
C) To request career advice from a specific professional
D) To offer to volunteer as a mentor for students
steps.kr: 검토를 위해 이력서와 진로 목표에 대한 간단한 진술서를 첨부했으며 고려받을 기회를 주시면 감사하겠습니다.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that the product you ordered, the Apex Wireless Speaker Model 9, will be delayed by approximately two weeks due to a manufacturing issue.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A customer inquiring about a delayed order
B) A company informing a customer about a product delay
C) A shipping company notifying of a logistics delay
D) A manufacturer updating a retailer about production
choices_kr: 제품 지연에 대해 고객에게 알리는 회사
steps.kr: 주문하신 제품 Apex 무선 스피커 모델 9가 제조 문제로 인해 약 2주 지연될 것임을 알려드립니다.

sentences: We understand this may cause inconvenience, especially if the item was intended as a gift, and sincerely apologize for the delay.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A retail partner stocking the product
B) A customer who ordered the product
C) A factory manager responsible for the delay
D) A marketing team promoting the product
steps.kr: 특히 물품이 선물로 의도된 경우 불편을 드릴 수 있음을 이해하며 지연에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다.

sentences: As a gesture of goodwill, we would like to offer you a 15% discount on your next purchase, along with free expedited shipping once your order ships.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To confirm that an order has been delivered on time
B) To inform a customer of a product delay and offer compensation
C) To request the customer to change their order
D) To promote a new version of the ordered product
choices_kr: 제품 지연을 고객에게 알리고 보상 제공
steps.kr: 호의의 표시로 다음 구매에 15% 할인과 주문 발송 시 무료 신속 배송을 제공해 드리고자 합니다.

sentences: This memo is issued by the Environmental Health and Safety Office to inform all kitchen and cafeteria staff of the updated food allergy labeling policy.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) A cafeteria employee requesting allergen information
B) The Environmental Health and Safety Office
C) A supplier providing allergen-free products
D) An allergy support group advocating for policy changes
choices_kr: 정책 변경을 주장하는 알레르기 지원 그룹
steps.kr: 이 메모는 업데이트된 식품 알레르기 표시 정책을 모든 주방 및 구내식당 직원에게 알리기 위해 환경 건강 및 안전 사무소에서 발행합니다.

sentences: As members of the food service team, you are required to clearly label all menu items containing any of the eight major allergens.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) All employees who eat in the cafeteria
B) Kitchen and cafeteria food service staff
C) The procurement team that orders food supplies
D) Medical staff advising on dietary restrictions
choices_kr: 주방 및 구내식당 식품 서비스 직원
식이 제한에 대해 조언하는 의료 직원
steps.kr: 식품 서비스팀의 구성원으로서 8대 주요 알레르겐을 포함하는 모든 메뉴 항목을 명확하게 표시해야 합니다.

sentences: A training session on the new labeling requirements will be held in the cafeteria kitchen on Friday at 3 P.M. and attendance is mandatory.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce new cafeteria menu items
B) To inform food service staff about a new allergen labeling policy and training
C) To report an allergy incident in the cafeteria
D) To request feedback on cafeteria food quality
choices_kr: 새 알레르겐 표시 정책 및 교육에 대해 식품 서비스 직원 안내
구내식당 식품 품질에 대한 피드백 요청
steps.kr: 새 표시 요건에 대한 교육 세션이 금요일 오후 3시 구내식당 주방에서 열리며 참석은 필수입니다.

sentences: I am writing to formally submit my resignation from my position as Senior Accountant at Horizon Analytics, effective May 31st.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A manager dismissing an employee
B) An employee submitting their resignation
C) HR processing an employment termination
D) A recruiter informing a company that an employee is leaving
choices_kr: 직원이 퇴사함을 회사에 알리는 채용 담당자
steps.kr: Horizon Analytics의 수석 회계사 직책에서 5월 31일부로 사직서를 공식적으로 제출합니다.

sentences: I have greatly valued my three years at the company and am grateful for the opportunities for professional growth provided under your leadership.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A colleague being informed of the departure
B) A direct supervisor or manager receiving the resignation
C) The HR department processing the paperwork
D) A new employer who offered the position
choices_kr: 사직서를 받는 직속 상사 또는 관리자
steps.kr: 회사에서의 3년을 매우 소중히 여기며 귀하의 리더십 하에 제공된 전문적 성장 기회에 감사합니다.

sentences: I am committed to ensuring a smooth handover and will work closely with my team to complete all outstanding tasks before my departure.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request a transfer to a different department
B) To formally resign from a position and ensure a smooth transition
C) To apply for a promotion before leaving
D) To negotiate a higher salary to stay
choices_kr: 직책에서 공식적으로 사직하고 원활한 전환 보장
steps.kr: 원활한 인수인계를 보장하기 위해 최선을 다할 것이며 퇴사 전 모든 미완료 업무를 완료하기 위해 팀과 긴밀히 협력하겠습니다.

sentences: I am writing to ask whether the company is able to sponsor our team's participation in the Seoul Half Marathon next month.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A marathon organizer seeking corporate sponsors
B) A company employee requesting sponsorship for a team event
C) A sports management agency representing the team
D) An HR manager organizing a company wellness activity
choices_kr: 팀 행사를 위한 후원을 요청하는 회사 직원
회사 웰니스 활동을 조직하는 인사 관리자
steps.kr: 다음 달 서울 하프 마라톤에 우리 팀이 참가할 수 있도록 회사가 후원해 줄 수 있는지 문의하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As the head of our marketing division, your department's budget allocation for community engagement activities might cover the registration fees.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A finance officer managing the general budget
B) A division head with access to a community engagement budget
C) An event coordinator registering the team
D) A colleague being invited to join the team
choices_kr: 지역 사회 참여 예산에 접근 가능한 부서장
steps.kr: 마케팅 부서장으로서 귀하의 부서 지역 사회 참여 활동 예산이 등록비를 충당할 수 있을 것 같습니다.

sentences: Participation would also serve as excellent brand visibility for the company, as the event attracts over 3,000 runners from the local business community.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To register the company as an official marathon sponsor
B) To request internal sponsorship for a team's marathon participation
C) To organize a company-wide health and wellness day
D) To ask colleagues to join a marathon running team
choices_kr: 팀 마라톤 참가를 위한 내부 후원 요청
전 회사 건강 및 웰니스 데이 조직
동료들에게 마라톤 달리기 팀 합류 요청
steps.kr: 이 행사는 지역 비즈니스 커뮤니티에서 3,000명 이상의 달리기 참가자를 끌어모으므로 참가는 회사의 훌륭한 브랜드 가시성 역할을 할 것입니다.

sentences: I am writing to inquire about the status of my visa application for a business visit to the United States, submitted on March 28th.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A consular officer processing visa applications
B) An applicant following up on a visa application
C) A travel agency managing visa documents
D) A company HR manager checking on an employee's visa
choices_kr: 직원 비자를 확인하는 회사 인사 관리자
steps.kr: 3월 28일에 제출한 미국 비즈니스 방문 비자 신청 상태를 문의하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I was informed by your office that the processing time would be 15 to 20 business days, and that period has now elapsed.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The company the applicant is visiting in the US
B) The embassy or consulate that received the application
C) A travel agent who submitted the documents
D) The government department in the applicant's home country
steps.kr: 귀 사무소에서 처리 시간이 영업일 기준 15~20일이라고 들었는데, 그 기간이 이제 경과했습니다.

sentences: Could you please provide an update on whether the visa has been approved or if any additional documents are required?
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To apply for a new type of visa
B) To inquire about the status of an existing visa application
C) To appeal a rejected visa application
D) To request extension of a current visa
steps.kr: 비자가 승인되었는지 또는 추가 서류가 필요한지 업데이트를 제공해 주시겠습니까?

sentences: I am writing to formally appeal the decision to decline my claim for short-term disability benefits, submitted in February.
steps.question: Who is sending this letter?
choices: A) An insurance company explaining a denied claim
B) A claimant appealing a denied benefits decision
C) A medical professional supporting the claim
D) An employer notifying HR of an employee's claim
choices_kr: 거절된 혜택 결정에 이의를 제기하는 청구인
steps.kr: 2월에 제출한 단기 장애 급여 청구 거절 결정에 대해 공식적으로 이의를 제기하기 위해 이 편지를 드립니다.

sentences: Your letter stated that the claim was denied due to insufficient medical documentation, which I believe was an error.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this letter?
choices: A) The claimant's personal physician
B) The insurance company or benefits provider that denied the claim
C) The employer's HR manager
D) A government labor oversight agency
choices_kr: 청구를 거절한 보험 회사 또는 혜택 제공자
steps.kr: 귀사의 편지에는 불충분한 의료 서류로 인해 청구가 거절되었다고 나와 있는데, 이것이 오류라고 생각합니다.

sentences: Enclosed please find three additional supporting documents from my treating physician, which clearly demonstrate the extent and duration of my condition.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To apply for a new type of disability benefit
B) To appeal a denied benefits claim with additional supporting documents
C) To terminate an existing insurance policy
D) To request a review of the insurance premium amount
choices_kr: 추가 지원 서류와 함께 거절된 혜택 청구에 이의 제기
steps.kr: 상태의 정도와 지속 기간을 명확하게 보여주는 담당 의사로부터의 세 가지 추가 지원 서류가 동봉되어 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to request approval for a business trip to Singapore from June 3rd to June 5th to attend the APAC Supply Chain Summit.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A travel coordinator booking flights and hotels
B) An employee requesting approval for a business trip
C) A conference organizer inviting a speaker
D) A manager approving a subordinate's trip
steps.kr: 6월 3일부터 5일까지 APAC 공급망 정상 회담 참가를 위한 싱가포르 출장 승인을 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As my direct supervisor, your sign-off is required before I can proceed with submitting the travel request through our HR system.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The HR department managing travel bookings
B) A direct supervisor with approval authority
C) A travel agency arranging the trip
D) A colleague who will cover duties during the absence
steps.kr: 직속 상사로서 귀하의 결재가 있어야 인사 시스템을 통해 출장 요청을 제출할 수 있습니다.

sentences: Attending this summit will provide valuable insights into global supply chain trends that directly support our Q3 strategy.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To report the results of a recent business trip
B) To request a supervisor's approval for a business trip
C) To cancel a previously approved business trip
D) To ask a colleague to attend a conference on their behalf
steps.kr: 이 정상 회담에 참가하면 Q3 전략을 직접 지원하는 글로벌 공급망 추세에 대한 귀중한 통찰을 얻을 수 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to formally request an extension of 30 days on the repayment of my personal loan, currently due on April 20th.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A bank officer issuing a late payment warning
B) A borrower requesting a loan repayment extension
C) A financial advisor recommending refinancing
D) An employer verifying an employee's salary for a loan
choices_kr: 대출을 위해 직원 급여를 확인하는 고용주
steps.kr: 현재 4월 20일에 만료되는 개인 대출 상환에 대해 30일 연장을 공식적으로 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: Due to unexpected medical expenses, I am temporarily unable to meet the full payment amount on the scheduled date.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A family member who lent the money
B) The bank or lender that issued the loan
C) A financial counselor providing debt advice
D) An insurance company covering medical expenses
choices_kr: 대출을 발행한 은행 또는 대출 기관
steps.kr: 예상치 못한 의료비로 인해 예정된 날짜에 일시적으로 전액 납부를 할 수 없습니다.

sentences: I assure you that I am committed to repaying the full amount and kindly request a revised payment schedule if an extension is not possible.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request early loan repayment to save on interest
B) To request a loan repayment extension due to financial difficulty
C) To dispute a charge added to the loan balance
D) To apply for an additional personal loan
choices_kr: 이자 절약을 위한 조기 대출 상환 요청
재정적 어려움으로 인한 대출 상환 연장 요청
대출 잔액에 추가된 요금 이의 제기
steps.kr: 전액 상환에 최선을 다할 것임을 보장드리며, 연장이 불가능하다면 수정된 납부 일정을 정중히 요청드립니다.

sentences: This is an internal announcement from Senior Management informing all departments of the upcoming merger between our company and Blueline Holdings, effective July 1st.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) Blueline Holdings announcing the merger to its own staff
B) Senior Management announcing the merger to all departments
C) A government agency approving the merger
D) An investment bank advising on the transaction
choices_kr: Blueline Holdings가 자사 직원에게 합병 발표
전 부서에 합병을 발표하는 고위 경영진
steps.kr: 이것은 7월 1일부로 당사와 Blueline Holdings 간의 합병을 모든 부서에 알리는 고위 경영진의 내부 발표입니다.

sentences: All employees should be aware that day-to-day operations will continue without interruption during the transition period.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) Blueline Holdings employees only
B) All employees of the company
C) Department heads being consulted on the merger
D) External stakeholders and investors
steps.kr: 모든 직원은 전환 기간 동안 일상 운영이 중단 없이 계속될 것임을 알아야 합니다.

sentences: A town hall meeting will be held on June 10th where leadership will address questions and share more details about the integration plan.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To request employees to vote on the merger decision
B) To inform all employees of an upcoming company merger
C) To announce the departure of senior leadership due to the merger
D) To introduce the leadership team of Blueline Holdings to staff
choices_kr: 전 직원에게 다가오는 회사 합병 안내
합병으로 인한 고위 리더십 퇴사 발표
steps.kr: 6월 10일 타운홀 회의가 열릴 예정이며 리더십이 질문에 답하고 통합 계획에 대한 세부 정보를 공유할 것입니다.

sentences: I am pleased to inform you that after participating in our trial program, you have been officially accepted as a full member of the Nexus Business Accelerator.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A startup founder applying to a business accelerator
B) The Nexus Business Accelerator welcoming a new member
C) An investor partnered with the accelerator
D) A mentor volunteering at the accelerator
choices_kr: 새 회원을 환영하는 Nexus Business Accelerator
steps.kr: 시범 프로그램 참가 후 귀하가 Nexus Business Accelerator의 정식 회원으로 공식적으로 수락되었음을 기쁘게 알려드립니다.

sentences: Your startup, GreenLink Technologies, demonstrated strong market potential and a compelling vision during the evaluation phase.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) An investor evaluating companies at the accelerator
B) The founder of a startup that has been accepted to the accelerator
C) A board member reviewing the accelerator's portfolio
D) A journalist covering startup news
steps.kr: 귀하의 스타트업 GreenLink Technologies는 평가 단계에서 강한 시장 잠재력과 설득력 있는 비전을 보여주었습니다.

sentences: Your six-month program begins on June 1st and includes access to mentorship, co-working facilities, and our investor network.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To notify a startup that their application was rejected
B) To inform a startup founder of acceptance into an accelerator program
C) To invite a startup to pitch to investors at a demo day
D) To offer a startup a direct investment from the accelerator
choices_kr: 스타트업 창업자에게 액셀러레이터 프로그램 합격 통보
스타트업을 데모 데이 투자자 피치에 초대
steps.kr: 6개월 프로그램은 6월 1일에 시작되며 멘토십, 공동 작업 공간 및 투자자 네트워크에 대한 접근을 포함합니다.

sentences: I am writing to formally request a letter of employment from your HR department to submit as part of my mortgage application.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A bank requesting employment verification for a loan applicant
B) An employee requesting a letter of employment from HR
C) An HR officer issuing employment letters to staff
D) A new hire requesting their employment contract
choices_kr: 대출 신청자의 취업 확인을 요청하는 은행
직원에게 취업 증명서를 발행하는 인사 담당자
steps.kr: 주택 담보 대출 신청의 일부로 제출하기 위해 인사부에 취업 증명서를 공식적으로 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As the department responsible for official employment documentation, I hope you are able to process my request within five business days.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The employee's direct manager
B) The HR department handling employment documentation
C) A bank loan officer reviewing the application
D) A notary public certifying the document
steps.kr: 공식 취업 서류를 담당하는 부서로서 영업일 기준 5일 이내에 제 요청을 처리해 주시기를 바랍니다.

sentences: The letter should confirm my position, start date, employment status, and current annual salary in order to satisfy the lender's requirements.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To apply for an internal job transfer
B) To request an official employment letter for a mortgage application
C) To request a reference letter for a job application
D) To report an error in the employee's official employment records
choices_kr: 주택 담보 대출 신청을 위한 공식 취업 증명서 요청
직원 공식 취업 기록 오류 신고
steps.kr: 대출 기관의 요건을 충족하기 위해 편지에 직책, 시작 날짜, 고용 상태 및 현재 연봉이 확인되어야 합니다.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that your application for membership in the Korea Chamber of Commerce has been reviewed and approved.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A business applying to join the chamber
B) The Korea Chamber of Commerce approving a membership
C) A government trade ministry reviewing applications
D) A chamber member endorsing a new applicant
steps.kr: 한국 상공회의소 회원 가입 신청이 검토 및 승인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: Your company, Sunrise Imports Ltd., will now have access to our extensive network of over 5,000 member businesses across 15 industries.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A long-standing chamber member receiving renewal confirmation
B) A newly approved member company
C) A government partner collaborating with the chamber
D) A journalist covering commerce and business news
choices_kr: 갱신 확인을 받는 장기 상공회의소 회원
상업 및 비즈니스 뉴스를 취재하는 기자
steps.kr: 귀사 Sunrise Imports Ltd.는 이제 15개 산업에 걸쳐 5,000개 이상의 회원 사업체로 구성된 광범위한 네트워크에 접근할 수 있습니다.

sentences: Your welcome package and membership card will be mailed within seven business days, and your online portal access will be activated by tomorrow.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To invite a company to apply for membership
B) To confirm membership approval and provide next steps
C) To inform a member of their annual fee renewal
D) To announce a new benefit for existing chamber members
choices_kr: 회원 가입 승인 확인 및 다음 단계 안내
기존 상공회의소 회원을 위한 새 혜택 발표
steps.kr: 환영 패키지와 회원 카드가 영업일 기준 7일 이내에 우편으로 발송되며, 온라인 포털 접근은 내일까지 활성화될 것입니다.

sentences: I am writing to request a copy of the full purchase agreement for the commercial property at 55 Gwanghwamun Avenue, signed in 2021.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A real estate agent helping a client buy a property
B) A party to the agreement requesting a copy of the document
C) A lawyer drafting a new version of the agreement
D) A government assessor requesting property records
choices_kr: 고객이 부동산 구매를 돕는 부동산 중개인
steps.kr: 2021년 서명된 광화문대로 55번지 상업용 부동산 매매 계약서 사본을 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As the firm that handled the original transaction, you should have the signed documentation in your records.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The current owner of the property
B) The law firm or agency that managed the original transaction
C) A city hall department maintaining property records
D) A co-signer on the original agreement
choices_kr: 원래 거래를 처리한 법률 회사 또는 기관
steps.kr: 원래 거래를 처리한 회사로서 귀하의 기록에 서명된 서류가 있어야 합니다.

sentences: Please send the document by email in PDF format at your earliest convenience, as it is needed for an ongoing audit.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To renegotiate the terms of the original purchase agreement
B) To request a copy of a previously signed property agreement
C) To report an error in the original purchase agreement
D) To request the cancellation of a property purchase
choices_kr: 이전에 서명된 부동산 계약서 사본 요청
steps.kr: 진행 중인 감사에 필요하므로 가능한 한 빨리 이메일로 PDF 형식으로 서류를 보내 주십시오.

sentences: This memo is from the Corporate Communications Team announcing the launch of our new internal employee feedback platform, called ConnectPulse.
steps.question: Who is sending this memo?
choices: A) An external software company launching a new product
B) The Corporate Communications Team
C) A group of employees who designed the platform
D) The IT Department updating internal systems
choices_kr: 새 제품을 출시하는 외부 소프트웨어 회사
steps.kr: 이 메모는 ConnectPulse라고 불리는 새 내부 직원 피드백 플랫폼의 출시를 발표하는 기업 커뮤니케이션팀의 것입니다.

sentences: All employees will be able to submit anonymous suggestions, report concerns, and participate in monthly engagement surveys through this platform.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) IT staff responsible for maintaining the platform
B) All employees who will use the platform
C) Senior managers who will review the feedback
D) External consultants evaluating the platform
steps.kr: 모든 직원은 이 플랫폼을 통해 익명 제안을 제출하고, 우려 사항을 신고하고, 월간 참여 설문에 참여할 수 있습니다.

sentences: Access to ConnectPulse will be activated through your company email login from May 1st; a short tutorial video is available on the intranet.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To request employees to submit their annual performance self-evaluation
B) To announce a new employee feedback platform and explain how to access it
C) To inform employees of changes to the existing HR information system
D) To survey employees about their job satisfaction
choices_kr: 직원에게 연간 성과 자기 평가 제출 요청
새 직원 피드백 플랫폼 발표 및 접근 방법 안내
기존 인사 정보 시스템 변경 안내
steps.kr: ConnectPulse 접근은 5월 1일부터 회사 이메일 로그인을 통해 활성화될 것이며, 짧은 튜토리얼 동영상이 인트라넷에서 이용 가능합니다.

sentences: I am writing to request that you consider waiving the early termination fee on my telecommunications contract, which I am looking to cancel before the end of my 24-month term.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A telecom company offering a contract extension
B) A customer requesting waiver of an early termination fee
C) A regulatory authority reviewing telecom pricing
D) A competitor offering a better deal to the customer
choices_kr: 조기 해지 수수료 면제를 요청하는 고객
steps.kr: 24개월 약정 종료 전에 취소하고자 하는 통신 계약의 조기 해지 수수료 면제를 검토해 주시기를 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: I have been a loyal customer with your company for over five years across two separate contracts and have always paid my bills on time.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A new telecom provider the customer wants to switch to
B) The current telecom provider the customer wants to leave
C) A consumer arbitration body reviewing the case
D) The customer's bank processing the fee payment
steps.kr: 저는 두 개의 별도 계약을 통해 귀사의 5년 이상 충성 고객이었으며 항상 청구서를 제때 납부해 왔습니다.

sentences: I hope my loyalty and payment history will be taken into consideration when reviewing this request.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To switch to a different service plan with the same provider
B) To request a waiver on an early termination fee for a telecom contract
C) To complain about poor network coverage
D) To request a refund on previously paid monthly charges
choices_kr: 같은 제공자의 다른 서비스 플랜으로 전환
통신 계약 조기 해지 수수료 면제 요청
불량한 네트워크 커버리지에 대한 불만 제기
이전에 납부한 월 요금 환불 요청
steps.kr: 이 요청을 검토할 때 저의 충성도와 납부 이력이 고려되기를 바랍니다.

sentences: I am writing on behalf of the Alumni Relations Office to invite you to participate in our annual homecoming reunion weekend, taking place September 12-14.
steps.question: Who is sending this letter?
choices: A) A current student organizing a campus event
B) The Alumni Relations Office inviting graduates
C) A classmate personally inviting an old friend
D) A hotel near the campus promoting a reunion package
choices_kr: 동문 패키지를 홍보하는 캠퍼스 근처 호텔
steps.kr: 9월 12일부터 14일까지 열리는 연례 홈커밍 동문 모임 주말에 참가하도록 귀하를 초대하기 위해 동문 관계 사무소를 대신하여 이 편지를 드립니다.

sentences: As a graduate of the Class of 2015, this year marks your 10-year reunion milestone, which will be celebrated with a special dinner on Saturday evening.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this letter?
choices: A) A current student about to graduate
B) A graduate of the Class of 2015 celebrating a reunion milestone
C) A faculty member invited to speak at the reunion
D) A donor being recognized at the reunion dinner
steps.kr: 2015년 졸업생으로서 올해는 귀하의 10년 동문 모임 마일스톤을 기념하며, 토요일 저녁에 특별 만찬으로 축하될 것입니다.

sentences: Please register by August 1st through our alumni portal at alumni.university.ac.kr to secure your spot and help us plan accordingly.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To request a donation from an alumnus for the university's fund
B) To invite a graduate to a homecoming reunion and request registration
C) To inform an alumnus of their recent recognition by the university
D) To announce a new alumni mentoring program
choices_kr: 대학 기금을 위해 동문에게 기부 요청
졸업생을 홈커밍 동문 모임에 초대하고 등록 요청
steps.kr: 자리를 확보하고 저희가 적절히 계획할 수 있도록 8월 1일까지 alumni.university.ac.kr의 동문 포털을 통해 등록해 주십시오.
